equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

title: 2025-11-19 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 31.87
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-11-19: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 31.87/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-11-19, the score printed 31.87/100 in the elevated regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
